metadata.description: Defendable per-feature ROI toolkit for healthcare Patient Engagement (PE) roadmaps. 4 specialized skills covering build / adjust / deep-review / portfolio lifecycle. ~37% lower token cost vs single-skill v1, 71% bug-catch rate preserved.

plugins.name: roi-toolkit
plugins.description: ROI lifecycle toolkit: roi-build (new feature), roi-adjust (modify with cascade), roi-deep-review (CFO+HoP audit), roi-portfolio (master rollup + Phase Plan + KILL/DEFER).
